description_long: This is a small, child-sized rocking chair designed in the shape of a horse, commonly known as a rocking horse. The chair features a solid seat and a stylized horse head at the front, with rounded handles for gripping and a circular backrest for support. The base consists of two smoothly curved wooden runners that allow for a gentle rocking motion. The construction combines light-colored natural wood with white-painted elements, giving it a modern yet playful appearance. The seat and horse head are both solid, while the runners and support structures are robust and slightly rounded for safety. This object is suitable for parks, playgrounds, or residential outdoor spaces where children might play.
description: A child-sized rocking horse chair with a solid seat, curved wooden runners, and a playful horse design in white and natural wood tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded backrest, handles, and the width of the curved runners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horse head, solid seat, and the full length of the curved runners.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest, seat, and the symmetry of the supporting frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the horse head profile, seat, and the curved runners from the other side.
